dialogues.text: (Week 7 is over... time flies so fast)
(Thanks to Nana-chan introducing her friends, I've been getting new clients)
(The reputation is good, and sales are steadily growing)
(Maybe I should buy some new equipment)
(I'd also like to attend some advanced seminars to improve my skills)
(Or should I try gambling for a big win to speed up repayment...?)
(No, maybe I should just look for a part-time job...)
(Well then, what should I do this week...)
